# PL gated-draft question bank — review sheet

**357 questions** across 15 entities. Generated by `scripts/draft/build-pl-quiz.mjs`.

Read for ONE thing: **would a neutral football fan have a fair shot at this?**
The script can filter shapes; it cannot judge that. Strike anything that reads as deep
club trivia, needs context the wording doesn't give, or isn't really a Premier League
question. Answer is marked `←`.

| Entity | Questions |
|---|---|
| Premier League Records | 32 |
| Arsenal | 40 |
| Liverpool | 40 |
| Manchester City | 40 |
| Manchester United | 32 |
| Chelsea | 33 |
| Tottenham Hotspur | 37 |
| Leicester City | 20 |
| Newcastle United | 17 |
| Everton | 11 |
| Aston Villa | 18 |
| West Ham United | 11 |
| Blackburn Rovers | 4 |
| Nottingham Forest | 8 |
| Leeds United | 14 |

## Premier League Records (32)

**1.** [medium/PL History] What club remarkably featured in 10 of their 13 overall Premier League campaigns during the 2002-2012 period?

- B. Fulham
- C. Wigan Athletic
- D. Blackburn Rovers
